title: drymonia glandulosa
intro: Drymonia glandulosa, also known as the glandular drymonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Drymonia glandulosa include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
